publicChat.ownerHint: If you are the owner: approve your profile (go live) under Profile, then try again.
publicChat.profileBlurb: Replies use this business's approved profile and questionnaire — not a generic chatbot.
publicChat.chatEndedBanner: This chat has ended. The business can see this thread on their Conversations page.

settingsPage.title: Widget Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Configure and embed the chat widget on your website
settingsPage.configDescription: Customize how the widget appears on your website
settingsPage.greetingPlaceholder: Hi! How can I help you today?
settingsPage.embedDescription: Copy and paste this code before the closing </body> tag on your website
settingsPage.copiedHint: Embed code copied! Paste it on your website to enable the chat widget.
settingsPage.step2: Go to your website's HTML code
settingsPage.step3: Find the closing </body> tag (usually at the very end of the page)
settingsPage.step6: The chat widget will appear on your website in seconds
settingsPage.helpBox: Need help? The widget will automatically adapt to any screen size, from large desktop monitors to small mobile phones.
settingsPage.previewDescription: See how the widget will look with your current settings
settingsPage.positionHint: The chat bubble will appear at the {{position}}
